title: Radmin Connect
description:
Easy Fast And Control Local Servers With Radmin Connect & Radmin VPN!
It's Easy And Fast!
body:
I created this mod that automatically connects to the your radmin VPN. This mod adds a button to the Minecraft local networks menu that only shows local networks. I also added the following commands: /open world - open a network /private world - close the world /connect setup - opens a convenient settings menu /connect help - shows help with mods in the chat
OK FINE THIS MOD GOT MUCH DOWNLOADS! THANKS!

⬇️ Installation is easy! ⬇️
1. Download the mod and upload it to the mods folder.
And the mod is installed!

⚠️ additional mods required for fabric - fabric api! ⚠️

🌏 Made by @Tenoych 🌏
